title: Normalize frontmatter validator paths for cross-platform evidence
reason: Windows emitted docs\\valid.md in EventLog summaries while tests and evidence contract expect docs/valid.md.
adr_reason: The change is a deterministic evidence-format hotfix; it does not change architecture, persistence, security policy, APIs, agents, providers or dependencies.
risks: Path normalization is still duplicated in several modules.
A future sprint should centralize path normalization in a shared utility.
